release: War Room OS Hosted Worker Fix v2.6

root_cause_reproduced.impact: background collector exited before publishing revision 2; dashboard remained on the bootstrap INITIALIZING snapshot
root_cause_reproduced.visibility_failure: worker stdout/stderr had been redirected to DEVNULL

streamlit_1_59_2_hosted_apptest.assertion: the deployment can no longer remain permanently INITIALIZING when the collector cannot obtain data

hard_timeout_recovery.assertion: a first-core timeout publishes an explicit degraded snapshot instead of leaving bootstrap state

controlled_core_fixture.assertion: collector-to-snapshot-to-dashboard market routing works for every market in a controlled fixture

limitations: These tests validate startup, error recovery, snapshot publication, iframe rendering, and controlled all-market routing.
They do not prove that the deployment host permits outbound access to every public endpoint.
Paid feeds still require valid API credentials, exchange entitlements, and provider-specific authentication.
If public price access is blocked by the host, v2.6 will show explicit DEGRADED/NO_DATA instead of inventing data.
